TCA-IRR

Investment Statements & Disclosures

Last updated: January 2025

1. Risk Disclosures

All investments involve risk, including the possible loss of principal. Past performance is not indicative of future results. The value of investments and the income derived from them may fluctuate, and investors may not recover the amounts originally invested.

Market conditions, interest rates, economic factors, and other variables can affect the performance of any investment. Investors should carefully consider their investment objectives, risk tolerance, time horizon, and financial situation before making any investment decisions.

2. Investment Disclaimers

The information provided through this platform is for informational and analytical purposes only. It does not constitute an offer to buy or sell any security, financial product, or instrument. All analysis, ratings, and scores generated by this platform are based on the data provided and the analytical models applied at the time of calculation.

TCA (Total Capital Allocation) and IRR (Internal Rate of Return) scores are proprietary analytical outputs and should be interpreted in the context of the specific company and industry being analyzed. These scores are not guarantees of future performance or investment outcomes.

3. No Financial Advice

Nothing contained in this platform constitutes investment, legal, tax, or other professional advice. You should consult with a qualified financial advisor, attorney, or tax professional before making any investment or financial decisions.

The analytical tools and reports provided are intended to supplement, not replace, independent professional judgment and due diligence. Users are solely responsible for their investment decisions.

4. Regulatory Compliance

This platform is designed to assist with financial analysis in compliance with applicable regulations and industry standards. Users are responsible for ensuring their use of the platform and any reports generated comply with all applicable laws, regulations, and professional standards in their jurisdiction.

Investment analysis frameworks referenced in this platform, including IRR and capital allocation methodologies, are applied in accordance with generally accepted financial analysis principles. Users should ensure their reporting obligations are met independently.

5. Data Sources Statement

Financial data used in analyses may be sourced from company filings, publicly available financial statements, third-party data providers, and user-supplied inputs. While we strive to ensure accuracy, we make no representations or warranties regarding the completeness, accuracy, or timeliness of any data.

Users who supply their own financial data are responsible for its accuracy and completeness. Analytical outputs are only as reliable as the underlying data inputs. TCA-IRR does not independently verify user-submitted financial information.

6. Forward-Looking Statements

Certain analyses, projections, and reports generated by this platform may contain forward-looking statements. These statements are based on current expectations, estimates, and assumptions, and are subject to risks and uncertainties that could cause actual results to differ materially from those projected.

Forward-looking statements are not guarantees of future performance. Actual events and circumstances may differ from those described in any forward-looking statements. Users should not place undue reliance on forward-looking projections when making investment decisions.
